text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking through the central
plaza...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Shhh! I'm observing McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I feel like someone is watching me... Hm... It must
be my imagination.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Whew! That was a close one!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can't let myself be spotted until I've figured out
the secret to McQueen's strength.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
No way! It's much more exciting to investigate it
myself!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wait! Where'd she go?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I only looked away for a second... Where could
she have gone?
choice_data_list:
Maybe she's belting out a song in the practice
room.

I think she's worrying over something in the
cafeteria.
I bet she's practicing at the training track!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I guess so. Let's head over there!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There sure are a lot of practice rooms... I wonder
where we should start.
Woo! Put your hands up!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I hear a song... It's coming from this room.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let me carry your dreams! ♪ Ahhh! Our
victories! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Her voice is so clear, and yet so strong...
How lovely. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Satono?!
I mean, um... What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now I've done it... I thought I could go all out
because the rooms are soundproofed...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. But thanks to that, I know your secret now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
S-s-s-secret?! What are you talking about?! A-all I
was doing was singing for a little change of pace!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: No. I can see right through you, McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You were psyching yourself up through song so
you can up your performance!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I mean, ahhh... Yeah, you got me...
O...hohohoho...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So... Would you mind teaching me that rousing
song you were singing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You thought it was rousing? Do you mean to say
you... liked it?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. There was such passion in the melody. Before
I knew it, my heart was aflutter.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I would like to fully comprehend the emotion you
poured into the song!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...There are two things I need to say first. Number
one, you mustn't tell anyone about what
happened today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And number two, this lesson will not be easy. Do
you understand?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Understood!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Okay, hold your head up high! Sing so the very
heavens can hear you... One, two...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Put your hands up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond sings at the top of her lungs and
masters the passionate song!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, I can just picture it. Well, shall we go
check?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Pancakes, fruit tarts... sweet potato cakes, and
almond tofu!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It all looks so good... But I can't go overboard!
Think, McQueen... Think!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow... McQueen is so serious when it comes to
desserts!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...I think I understand the secret of her strength
now.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We should take even the smallest decisions in our
daily lives seriously. All of these combined efforts
add up to something very important!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gyah! S-Satono?! Were you watching me?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes. You looked so serious... and so cool!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
W-well, that's... nice of you to say. But it's also a
little embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
From now on, I'm going to take my dessert
selection as seriously as you do!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Let's see here... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
"Selection of Curious Morsels"... I'll go with
that! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Squid ink cheesecake? Pudding sushi? What in
the world is all this?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Um, Satono... Didn't you say you were going to
choose carefully?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I am! There are so many mysterious desserts...
Don't you think there's a lot to be gained from
trying them? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're so inquisitive! You intend to just dive right
in?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then I shall join you. Let us explore these curious
morsels together!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Great! Let's explore new frontiers together!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
In that case... How about the mushroom Mont
Blanc?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Um, Satono. Could we think just a little bit
more carefully?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After extensive consideration, the two enjoy
some desserts together!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ah yes, the classic secret training session. Let's go
check it out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Um... Why are you standing in the middle of the
track?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
This is a checkpoint. If you want to get past, you
need to make me laugh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're being a nuisance. Hurry up and get out of
the way.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Um... Was that supposed to be funny?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't a joke! Now, move before I make you
move!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Out of my way!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What in the?! I couldn't budge her an inch!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: And there she goes... What power. Terrifying.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Um, what were you two just doing? It looked like
you were sumo wrestling...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right. It was an unthinkable final bout. I was
powerless against her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Could McQueen's strength lie in her rock-solid
lower body strength?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Golshi. Would you wrestle me too?! I'm ready!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Heh... It's still too early for you. Go work on your
one-liners and get back to me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: One-liners?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't seem to improve my time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I spent too much energy dealing with Gold
Ship earlier. Speaking of Gold Ship... I hope she
doesn't cause me any more trouble.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Uh-oh. What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ding ding ding ding!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Soleus muscle!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Soleus muscle!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! Put your back into it! McQueen was
way more serious when she did it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Got it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I did nothing of the sort!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: McQueen?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Umm, how do I explain thi—oh, where did Golshi
get off to?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Over the course of her strange joke practice,
Satono Diamond happens to build muscle
strength!
